metadata.title: Quick Peek Sidebar
metadata.description: Opens the left and/or right side panel by hovering over it.

regex.source: .setDesc("Enables the expansion and collapsing of the left sidebar on hover.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用在悬停时左侧边栏的展开和折叠。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enables the expansion and collapsing of the right sidebar on hover. Only collapses the right panel unless you have a right ribbon.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用在悬停时右侧边栏的展开和折叠。只有在没有右侧丝带时才会折叠右侧面板。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, hovering over the right sidebar will also expand the left sidebar at the same time, and vice versa. (Left and Right sidebar must both be enabled above)")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后，悬停在右侧边栏上也会同时展开左侧边栏，反之亦然。（上方必须同时启用了左侧和右侧边栏）")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, sidebars will slide over the main content without affecting the layout. When disabled, sidebars will expand by pushing content.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后，边栏会在不影响布局的情况下滑到主内容上方。禁用时，边栏会通过推送内容来展开。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the number of pixels from the left edge of the editor that will trigger the left sidebar to open on hover (must be greater than 0)")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定从编辑器左侧边缘开始触发左侧边栏在悬停时打开的像素数（必须大于0）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the number of pixels from the right edge of the editor that will trigger the right sidebar to open on hover (must be greater than 0)")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定从编辑器右侧边缘开始触发右侧边栏在悬停时打开的像素数（必须大于0）")

regex.source: .setDesc("The delay in milliseconds before the sidebar collapses after the mouse has left. Enter '0' to disable delay.")
regex.target: .setDesc("鼠标离开后侧边栏折叠前的延迟时间（毫秒）。输入'0'可禁用延迟。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The delay in milliseconds before the sidebar expands after hovering. Default is 200ms.")
regex.target: .setDesc("悬停后侧边栏展开前的延迟时间（毫秒）。默认为200毫秒。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The speed of the sidebar expand/collapse animation in milliseconds.")
regex.target: .setDesc("侧边栏展开/折叠动画的速度（毫秒）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the maximum width in pixels for the left sidebar when expanded")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定左侧边栏展开时的最大宽度（以像素为单位）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the maximum width in pixels for the right sidebar when expanded")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定右侧边栏在展开时的最大宽度（以像素为单位）")
